title: System and method for contactless biometric authentication
abstract: A biometric authentication system for detecting biometric characteristic data from a body part of an individual and verifying the detected biometric characteristic data against registered biometric characteristic data already obtained from said body part to authenticate the individual, comprising: an illumination unit (110) for illuminating the body part; an image capturing unit (114) to capture an image of the illuminated body part; a processing unit (118) for extracting the biometric characteristic data from the image captured by the image capturing unit (114); and an authentication unit (120) for verifying the extracted biometric data against registered characteristic data to authenticate the individual; wherein the illumination unit (110) is provided with at least one pattern mask (112) in order to project a mask pattern (701) onto the body part such that the projected mask pattern is included in the captured image.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A biometric authentication system for detecting biometric characteristic data from a body part of an individual and verifying the detected biometric characteristic data against registered biometric characteristic data already obtained from said body part to authenticate the individual, comprising : an illumination unit (110) for illuminating the body part; an image capturing unit (114) to capture an image of the illuminated body part; a processing unit (118) for extracting the biometric characteristic data from the image captured by the image capturing unit ( 114); and an authentication unit (120) for verifying the extracted biometric data against registered characteristic data to authenticate the individual; characterized in that, the illumination unit (110) is provided with at least one pattern mask (112) in order to project a mask pattern (701) onto the body part such that the projected mask pattern is included in the captured image. 2. A biometric authentication system according to claim 1, wherein the pattern mask has a regular pattern of polygons, preferably triangle, tetragon, square, pentagon or hexagon. 3. A biometric authentication system according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the illumination unit comprises at least one light source of visible light source and/or at least one light source of near infra-red (NIR) light, and wherein the light source preferably comprise a plurality of light emitting diodes (LEDs). 4. A biometric authentication system according to claim 3, wherein the light sources or LEDs are placed in a circular manner around the capturing unit. 5. A biometric authentication system according to claim 3 or 4, wherein different light sources are placed alternately. 6. A biometric authentication system according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the biometric authentication system further comprises a visual guidance unit being able to determine the optimal distance between body part and capture unit based on the mask pattern projected onto the body part. 7. A biometric authentication system according to one of the preceding claims, wherein the capturing unit comprises a micro lens array for obtaining depth information of the body part. 8. A biometric authentication method for detecting biometric characteristic data from a body part of an individual and verifying the detected biometric characteristic data against registered characteristic data already obtained from said body part to authenticate the individual, comprising the steps of: illuminating the body part using an illumination unit (110) provided with at least one pattern mask (112) in order to project a mask pattern onto the body part; capturing an image of the illuminated body part including the projected mask pattern using an image capturing unit (114); extracting the biometric characteristic data from the image captured by the image capturing unit (114) using a processing unit (118); verifying the extracted biometric data against 

 registered characteristic data to authenticate the individual using an authentication unit (120). 9. A biometric authentication method according to claim 8, wherein the pattern mask has a regular pattern of polygons, preferably triangle, tetragon, square, pentagon or hexagon, and is used to obtain the optimal distance between body part and capturing unit. 10. A biometric authentication method according to one of claims 8 to 9, wherein the mask pattern is used for guidance of the body part in order to obtain an optimal distance between body part and capturing unit. 11. A biometric authentication method according to claim 8 to 10, wherein the illumination unit illuminates the body part with visible light and NIR light in order to obtain combined images including structures of the body part detectable under visible light and NIR light, respectively, and the mask pattern. 12. A biometric authentication method according to claim 11, wherein the mask pattern is used for extracting the characteristic biometric data. 13. Biometric authentication device for capturing images to perform the method according to one of claims 8 to 12, the device comprising an illumination unit (110) for illuminating the body part; an image capturing unit (114) to capture an image of the illuminated body part; characterized in that, the illumination unit (110) is provided with at least one pattern mask (112) in order to project a mask pattern (701) onto the body part such that the projected mask pattern is included in the captured image. 14. Biometric authentication device according to claim 13, wherein it further comprises a processing unit (118) for extracting the biometric characteristic data from the image captured by the image capturing unit (114) and an authentication unit (120) for verifying the extracted biometric data against registered characteristic data to authenticate the individual. 15. Biometric authentication device according to claim 13, wherein it further comprises means for connecting the device to an external processing unit (118) for extracting the biometric characteristic data from the image captured by the image capturing unit (114) and means for connecting it to an authentication unit (120) for verifying the extracted biometric data against registered characteristic data to authenticate the individual.
